title: Ice Troll King
wikitext:
{{External|rs}} {{Otheruses|the quest boss from [[The Fremennik Isles]]|the Nightmare Zone variant|Ice Troll King (Nightmare Zone)}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Ice Troll King |image = [[File:Ice Troll King.png|190px]] |release = [[6 February]] [[2007]] |update = Fremennik Isles |members = Yes |combat = 122 |size = 2 |examine = '''Normal:''' An impressive looking troll.
'''Dead:''' Not so impressive anymore!
'''Decapitated:''' Even less impressive! |xpbonus = -100 |max hit = 21 (melee), 16 (special), 11 (Magic), 7 (Ranged) |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Crush]], [[Magic]], [[Ranged]] |attack speed = 4 |slayxp = 161 |cat = Trolls |assignedby = vannaka,chaeldar,nieve,duradel |hitpoints = 150 |att = 100 |str = 100 |def = 80 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 60 |strbns = 60 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 45 |dslash = 45 |dcrush = 45 |dmagic = 2000 |elementalweaknesstype = Fire |elementalweaknesspercent = 35 |drange = 2000 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |id = 5822 |flatarmour=0}} [[File:Ice Troll King chathead.png|left]] The '''Ice Troll King''' is the [[boss]] monster for [[The Fremennik Isles]] [[quest]], and is the leader of the [[ice troll]]s. He is located on the northern part of the isles in [[Ice Troll Caves|his lair]]. He uses all three [[Combat style]]s, which includes a [[Melee]] attack, a [[Magic]] attack that freezes players, and a [[Ranged]] in which he will throw rocks at players and a [[special]] move, which will send players flying across the battleground. A [[Ice Troll King (Nightmare Zone)|version of him]] that only attacks with melee can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete. ==Strategy== His [[special attack]] knocks the player backwards which can be negated with [[Protect from Magic]] or [[Protect from Missiles]]. Using [[Protect from Melee]] results in the Troll King knocking the player into the cave wall for very high damage, which can be done repeatedly. His defensive stats for Magic and Ranged are '''extremely''' high so melee is the best method to kill him. With melee armour, it is recommended to use Protect from Magic to minimise damage. His low Ranged level cannot hit as accurately or as strong as his Magic attacks. Protect from Magic will also stop his attack that is similar to [[Ice Barrage]]. Wielding a [[Neitiznot shield]] will reduce the maximum hit of the Troll King's Ranged attack from 7 to 2 damage.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1321723069946302464|date=29 October 2020|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/103425|archivedate=29 October 2020|quote=Changes the damage roll from 0-6 to 0-2 for trolls' rock-throwing attacks, yes. That's the females, the thrower trolls and the ones encountered in a quest-specific battle area during the Fremennik Isles quest.}} [[Yak-hide armour]] does not grant any damage-reducing effect if worn in the fight against the Ice Troll King.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1269560478356905985|date=7 June 2020|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/103425|archivedate=29 October 2020|quote=[Hi Ash, the (os/rs3) wikis mention a (set-?)effect for yak-hides against ice trolls. Claimingit reduces the max-hit of some trolls. (...)] I don't think that bonus exists in OSRS. [Does yak-hide armour reduce damage/hit frequency from the ice troll king?] If there is any code checking for that stuff and modifying combat based on it, I can't find it.}} [[ring of recoil|Rings of recoil]] can be used to great effect to kill him by standing at a distance where he will only use Ranged attacks. This method is slow, but if you are patient, bring enough food to heal approximately 200 hitpoints, 3-5 rings of recoil, and your best Range or Magic damage gear while having the [[Neitiznot shield]] equipped, he is almost a guaranteed kill without even using prayer. Simply click on the bridge to enter his lair, attack him, and don't move. He will only hit a max of 2 allowing you to recoil consistent damage. With a few hits from your range or magic he will go down eventually. After the Ice Troll King is dead, decapitate his [[Ice Troll King (Corpse)|corpse]] and take the [[Decapitated head (The Fremennik Isles)|head]] to the [[Mawnis Burowgar]] to show that he has been defeated. ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 25 June 2025 |update = Summer Sweep Up: Combat |change = The Ice Troll King now has a 35% Fire weakness. }} {{Subject changes footer}} == Trivia == * Possibly due to an oversight, the Nightmare Zone hard mode version of the Ice Troll King only attacks using melee, not using ranged, magic, or his special knockback move. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Trolls}} {{The Fremennik Isles}} {{Rulers}} {{Nightmare Zone}} [[Category:Bosses]] [[Category:Quest monsters]][[Category:Monarchs and Rulers]]
